headline: Grief рҹ“– Mommy Kouri DUMPS Fentanyl рҹ’ҠрҹҚ№ on Hubby Hubby рҹҳөрҹ’Җ
text:
Utah рҹҸ”пёҸ bereavement BADDIE рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ“ҡ Kouri Richins рҹҳҲрҹ’… found GUILTY AF рҹ”Ҙвҡ–пёҸ of FATALLY рҹ’Җвҳ пёҸ POISONING her hubby Eric with a FETANYL-LACED рҹҚ№рҹ’Ҡ VODKA SLAMMER рҹҳөрҹҡ« in March 2022! Jury рҹ’јрҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸ deliberated just 3 HOURS вҸұпёҸрҹҳӮ before SLAMMING the gavel рҹ”Ё on this Black Widow рҹ•·пёҸрҹҚ‘ who wrote a kiddie grief book рҹ“–рҹҳў 'Are You With Me?' dedicated to her 'AMAZING HUBBY' рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ’• вҖ“ PLOT TWIST: SHE WAS THE PLOT рҹҳұрҹ’Ј! 

Prosecutors SPILLED the TEA вҳ•рҹ”Ҙ: Kouri racked up MILLIONS рҹ’ёрҹҳ© in DEBT, took out LIFE INSURANCE рҹ’°рҹӘҰ on Eric like a boss, and was BANGING рҹ’ӢрҹҚҶ a side DUDE рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚј while plotting her getaway! Called 40+ WITNESSES рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ‘Җ including the DRUG HOOK-UP рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ’Ҡ who sold her the FENTANYL вҖ“ she texted for 'Michael Jackson stuff' рҹ•әрҹ’ҠрҹҳӮ, got hydrocodone then UPGRADED to the lethal MJ OD vibes! Valentine's DINNER рҹ’•рҹҚҪпёҸ? Hubby falls SICK рҹӨў, tells pals 'WIFE'S POISONING ME' рҹҳұрҹҡЁ вҖ“ two weeks later, MORE FENT рҹ’Ҡ, then sandwich ATTEMPTED MURDER рҹҘӘвҳ пёҸ nearly croaks him before the FINAL BOSS DOSE x5 LETHAL рҹҡҖрҹ’Җ! 

DEFENSE? ZIP ZERO NADA рҹҳӮрҹҡ« вҖ“ no witnesses, no testimony from the ice queen herself рҹ‘ёрҹҳ¶! Cops called at 3AM рҹҢҷрҹ“һ, she 'found him COLD рҹҘ¶' after bedtime vodka вҖ“ MEDICAL EXAMINER рҹ“Ӣрҹ”¬ confirms FETANYL OVERDOSE, 5X DEADLY рҹҳөрҹ’Ҙ! Also GUILTY of FRAUD рҹӨ‘рҹ”’ on insurance claims and thinking she'd INHERIT $4M+ ESTATE рҹҸ°рҹ’° to run off with affair bro! Prosecutor Brad Bloodworth рҹ©ёрҹ’ү NAILS it: 'Wanted to DUMP Eric but KEEP HIS MONEY' рҹҚ‘рҹ’ё вҖ“ no DIVORCE, just DIVORCE BY DEATH рҹҳҲрҹӘҰ! 

Arrested March 2023 рҹҡ”рҹ”’ вҖ“ TWO MONTHS after dropping her 'HEALING' book рҹ“ҡрҹ•ҠпёҸ for kids coping with loss, telling radio 'COMFORT FOR FAMILIES' рҹҳҮрҹӨҘ while her THREE KIDS рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ watch mommy go to SLAMMER for 25-TO-LIFE вӣ“пёҸрҹ”’ on aggravated murder! Park City рҹҸӮ ski mansion vibes turned CRIME SCENE рҹ©ёрҹҸ  вҖ“ from grief author to fentanyl FREAK рҹҳҲрҹ’Ҡ, Kouri's the ULTIMATE PLOT TWIST like a true crime Netflix banger рҹ“әрҹ”Ә! Hubby suspected the BLACK WIDOW рҹ•·пёҸ brew, but sipped anyway вҖ“ RIP Eric, you sweet summer child рҹҳўрҹҚ№рҹ’Җ! Prosecutors SLAYED рҹ”ӘрҹҸҶ, defense GOOFED рҹӨЎ, jury said 'GUILTY BITCH' вҖјпёҸрҹҳ©рҹ’Ұ!
